chunks.en: The shortcut I use most is copy and paste every day.
chunks.ja: 私が一番よく使うショートカットは、毎日使うコピーと貼り付けです。

chunks.en: Copy and paste save me a lot of time at work.
chunks.ja: コピーと貼り付けは、仕事で多くの時間を節約してくれます。

chunks.en: I hit undo a lot when I make a small mistake.
chunks.ja: 小さなミスをしたとき、私はよく元に戻すを押します。

chunks.en: Switching between windows is much faster with a keyboard shortcut.
chunks.ja: ウィンドウの切り替えは、キーボードショートカットを使うとずっと速いです。

chunks.en: Some shortcuts are hard to remember, so I keep forgetting them.
chunks.ja: 覚えにくいショートカットもあって、私はよく忘れてしまいます。

chunks.en: In the end, a few good shortcuts make my day easier.
chunks.ja: 結局、いくつかの良いショートカットが私の一日を楽にしてくれます。

outline: Opening: shortcuts I use most are copy and paste
Point 1: undo helps when I make mistakes
Point 2: switching windows is faster with a shortcut
Wrap-up: some are hard to remember but shortcuts help

modelTalk.text: I use keyboard shortcuts every day, and they save me lots of time. Copy and paste are the ones I use most. I press them all the time when I write or study. It's so much faster than using the mouse. I also hit undo a lot when I make a mistake. It's great, because I can fix things fast. Sometimes I make many mistakes, but undo always helps me. Switching between windows is faster with a shortcut too. I don't want to click each window with my mouse. So I just press two keys, and it changes. But there are some shortcuts I keep forgetting. I learn them, and then I forget them again. Maybe I need to practice them more. I think shortcuts are really useful, and I want to learn more. They make my work easier every day.

chunks.en: The shortcut I use most is copy and paste, all day long.
chunks.ja: 私が一番よく使うショートカットはコピーと貼り付けで、一日中使っています。

chunks.en: I hit undo a lot when I make a small mistake in my code.
chunks.ja: コードで小さなミスをしたとき、私は元に戻すをよく押します。

chunks.en: Switching between windows is much faster when I use a keyboard shortcut.
chunks.ja: キーボードのショートカットを使うと、ウィンドウの切り替えがずっと速いです。

chunks.en: There are some shortcuts I keep forgetting, like the one for split screen.
chunks.ja: 画面分割のショートカットのように、なかなか覚えられないものもあります。

chunks.en: So learning a few good shortcuts really saves me time every single day.
chunks.ja: だから良いショートカットをいくつか覚えると、毎日本当に時間の節約になります。

outline: Opening: shortcuts save time at work
Point 1: copy, paste, and undo I use daily
Point 2: window switching is faster, but some are hard to remember
Wrap-up: learning shortcuts saves time every day

modelTalk.text: I use keyboard shortcuts every day, and they really save me time. Copy and paste are the ones I use the most. I copy some text, then paste it somewhere else, and it's done in a second. When I make a mistake, I hit undo a lot, so I don't have to fix things by hand. That little shortcut has saved me so many times. Switching between windows is much faster with a shortcut too. Instead of clicking around, I just press two keys and jump straight there. Still, there are some shortcuts I keep forgetting, even after I've looked them up. I try to use them, but my fingers go back to the old way. So I'm slowly learning new ones, and I think practice is the only thing that really helps.
